prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is U-101 Trench protection within 2.11 Sitework & Utilities. The relevant subcategory is 2.11.1 Excavation & Trenching. The observed field condition is: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1926 Subpart P. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T1 U-101 Measurement & estimation
